title: Social Media: For Parents (RSV) | Respiratory Illnesses | CDC
text:

COVID-19 
Seasonal Flu 
Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) 
Respiratory Illnesses 
Social Media: For Parents (RSV) 
Dec. 22, 2025 
What to know 
Use this social media carousel and sample messages to encourage parents to take action to protect their child from severe illness from respiratory viruses, such as RSV. Available in English and Spanish.
Format: PNG Dimensions: 1080 x 1080 pixels Language: English (US) Size: 529 KB Length: Last updated: August 18, 2025
